mapper.sql: b.id, b.isbn, b.title, b.author, b.publisher, b.publish_date, b.category_id, b.price, b.location, b.total_count, b.available_count, b.description, b.cover_url, b.status, b.create_time, b.update_time, c.name as category_name
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM book b LEFT JOIN book_category c ON b.category_id = c.id AND c.deleted = 0 WHERE b.deleted = 0
AND (b.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR b.isbn LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND b.category_id = #{categoryId}
AND b.author LIKE CONCAT('%', #{author}, '%')
ORDER BY b.create_time DESC
SELECT FROM book b LEFT JOIN book_category c ON b.category_id = c.id AND c.deleted = 0 WHERE b.deleted = 0 AND b.id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE book SET available_count = available_count - 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0 AND available_count > 0
UPDATE book SET available_count = available_count + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0 AND available_count < total_count
mapper.select: SELECT , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrow_record br WHERE br.book_id = b.id AND br.deleted = 0) as borrow_count FROM book b LEFT JOIN book_category c ON b.category_id = c.id AND c.deleted = 0 WHERE b.deleted = 0 AND b.status = 1 ORDER BY borrow_count DESC, b.available_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT c.id as categoryId, c.name as categoryName, COUNT(b.id) as bookCount, COALESCE(SUM(b.total_count), 0) as totalCount FROM book_category c LEFT JOIN book b ON c.id = b.category_id AND b.deleted = 0 WHERE c.deleted = 0 AND c.parent_id = 0 GROUP BY c.id, c.name ORDER BY bookCount DESC
